title: Linux Shell Profile Persistence
description: Detects modification of shell profile files (.bashrc, .bash_profile, .profile) for persistence. Malicious commands added to these files execute on every user login.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*.bashrc*' or msg like '*.bash_profile*' or msg like '*.profile*' or msg like '*/etc/profile.d/*' or msg like '*/etc/bash.bashrc*')))
